note: Random table routed to an engine roll table. Two printed shapes: grid (die column + result columns; entry claims ONE result column via assists.column, rows y-clustered) and list (numbered prose paragraphs anchored by '<n>:' runs). Row ranges are structure shipped as section labels (r<lo> or r<lo>-<hi>); row text stays lazy per seat. The roll formula materializes via a dice locator box (assists.rollAt).
